final_prompt.prompt:
Generate an original, non-infringing brand exposure splash screen for OPPO Find X9 Ultra smartphone announcement, designed for 1080×1920 vertical display with visual impact priority.

Style/medium: bold brand splash screen with the geometric confidence of contemporary tech advertising, designed for maximum first-glance impact
Composition: vertical 9:16 frame with centered product hero, generous top and bottom breathing room, dynamic diagonal energy lines or light streaks guiding eye to center
Subject: OPPO Find X9 Ultra smartphone as hero product, floating or angled to show premium build quality
Scene/backdrop: abstract gradient void or minimal architectural space that amplifies the product without distraction
Lighting/mood: dramatic product lighting with crisp highlights and deep shadows, the confidence of a flagship launch moment
Color palette: OPPO brand orange as dominant accent against deep charcoal or midnight blue, high contrast for screen legibility
Materials/textures: brushed metal and glass surfaces catching light, subtle lens flare for premium tech feel
Text (verbatim): OPPO Find X9 Ultra
Constraints: 1080×1920 vertical format, brand exposure priority, visual impact over information density, smartphone clearly recognizable at thumbnail scale
Avoid: cluttered UI elements, small unreadable text, generic stock photo aesthetic, soft or flat lighting that diminishes premium feel
